name: Requisition Sweep
visual_description: A sweeping enforcement action in a grand chamber: white-armored officials confiscate glowing artifacts and enchanted relics from shelves and pedestals. Magical items crumble and dissolve under their touch. In the background, a desiccated corpse in royal robes sits motionless on a technological throne, neural cables trailing from an empty skull, overseeing the seizure with hollow indifference.
full_prompt: A sweeping enforcement action in a grand chamber: white-armored officials confiscate glowing artifacts and enchanted relics from shelves and pedestals. Magical items crumble and dissolve under their touch. In the background, a desiccated corpse in royal robes sits motionless on a technological throne, neural cables trailing from an empty skull, overseeing the seizure with hollow indifference.. Stylized digital illustration, structured balanced composition, warm sandstone and ivory tones, golden-hour lighting with long shadows, post-apocalyptic science-fantasy setting.
